/usr/bin/ar qc libcopal.a CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/core/foundation/version.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/core/foundation/error.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/core/foundation/allocator.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/core/foundation/utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/text/font.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/text/stb_impl.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/theme/theme.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/render/paint_context.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/render/mock/renderer_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/platform/mock/platform_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widget/widget.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/layout/vbox.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/layout/hbox.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/layout/scrollview.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/label.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/button.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/checkbox.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/radiobutton.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/slider.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/combobox.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/widgets/textbox.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/app/application.c.o CMakeFiles/copal.dir/src/app/window.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcopal.a
